untranslatable_reason: The signal requires classification into 'value' and 'glamour' portfolios using the CP X GS (Capitalization × Growth-to-Stock) methodology, which is a fundamental/statistical classification scheme not expressible through technical indicators. The decile-based portfolio construction and relative value/glamour classification cannot be directly translated into technical indicator conditions. Approximation using zscore_20 (mean-reversion proxy) is provided as a heuristic only.
translation_notes: Original signal requires fundamental/quantitative stock classification (CP X GS method) to identify value vs. glamour stocks. Available technical indicators cannot replicate this classification. Proposed alternative uses z-score mean reversion as a proxy for value (negative z-score = undervalued) vs. glamour (positive z-score = overvalued), but this is NOT equivalent to the actual CP X GS classification scheme described in the source material. A proper implementation would require access to fundamental data (P/E ratios, growth metrics) and custom classification logic outside the technical indicator framework.
